title: Simply Dark Mode
description: Adds a new dark mode to Minecraft!
body:
There are a lot of Resource Packs out there.
Some of them add dark mode to Minecraft. But most (or the ones that I have seen) also changes the textures of, say, the health bar, or the hunger meter.
I've done my best to make one that simply adds dark mode, so enjoy!
## UPDATE
heh heh...don't think that I approve of this anymore...at all
